---
title: "Thomas F Kent"
image: images/tom_kent.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## This is about me

Lots of cool things about me.
:::


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8

library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

data.table(
  x = runif(100),
  y = runif(100),
  shape = sample(LETTERS[1:3], 100, replace = TRUE),
  color = sample(letters[1:4], 100, replace = TRUE)
) |>
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      shape = shape,
      color = color
    )) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3
  )
```
